parameters.query:
UPDATE job_listing.job_links
SET video_created = true
WHERE date = $1
  AND video_created = false
  AND audio_added = true;

parameters.query:
UPDATE job_listing.mp4_list
SET 
    end_time = $1,
    mp4_name = $2,
    mp4_path = $3,
    status = 'success'
WHERE 
    execution_id = $4;

SELECT *
FROM job_listing.mp4_list
WHERE date = $1
  AND video_type = $2
  AND status = 'failed'
LIMIT 1;

WITH ordered AS (
  SELECT
    id,
    status,
    pages_scrapped,
    job_id,
    num_of_jobs,
    video_type,
    date,
    ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY video_type ORDER BY id ASC) AS rn
  FROM job_listing.mp4_list
  WHERE date = $1
),
type_first_failed AS (
  SELECT 
    MIN(rn) AS failed_rn,
    MIN(job_id) FILTER (WHERE status = 'failed') AS failed_job_id
  FROM ordered
  WHERE status = 'failed' AND video_type = $2
),
type_base AS (
  SELECT COUNT(*) AS total_rows 
  FROM ordered
  WHERE video_type = $2
),
global_last_row AS (
  -- Changed: Look at ALL dates, not just $1
  SELECT 
    job_id,
    num_of_jobs,
    pages_scrapped
  FROM job_listing.mp4_list
  WHERE date <= $1  -- All dates up to and including query date
  ORDER BY id DESC
  LIMIT 1
)
SELECT
  CASE
    WHEN (SELECT total_rows FROM type_base) = 0 THEN 1
    WHEN (SELECT failed_rn FROM type_first_failed) IS NOT NULL 
      THEN (SELECT failed_rn FROM type_first_failed)
    ELSE (SELECT total_rows FROM type_base) + 1
  END AS epoch,
  
  COALESCE((SELECT pages_scrapped FROM global_last_row), 0) AS pages_scrapped,
  
  CASE
    WHEN (SELECT total_rows FROM type_base) = 0 THEN 
      COALESCE(
        (SELECT job_id FROM global_last_row) + (SELECT num_of_jobs FROM global_last_row),
        1
      )
    WHEN (SELECT failed_rn FROM type_first_failed) IS NOT NULL 
      THEN (SELECT failed_job_id FROM type_first_failed)
    ELSE COALESCE(
      (SELECT job_id FROM global_last_row) + (SELECT num_of_jobs FROM global_last_row),
      1
    )
  END AS job_id;

SELECT COUNT(*) AS video_count
FROM job_listing.job_links
WHERE date = $1
  AND id >= $2
  AND video_created = FALSE;

UPDATE job_listing.mp4_list
SET 
    status = 'failed'
WHERE 
    execution_id = $1;

SELECT * FROM job_listing.job_links
WHERE date=$1
  AND (audio_added=false OR script_added=false)
  AND video_created=false
ORDER BY id ASC
LIMIT 1
